name: Bamboo Drying Rack Brown - Brightroom™: Freestanding Varnished Dish Drying Rack, Folds for Storage, 17.76" Depth
description:
Allow dishes, bowls and flatware to naturally air dry with the help of this Bamboo Drying Rack from Brightroom™. This bamboo drying rack features a two-tier slatted construction to allow washed dishes to dry quickly. Featuring a freestanding design for easy placement on your countertops, it has a foldable design for space-efficient storage when not in use. Plus, the varnished bamboo finish will bring a rustic touch to your kitchen decor.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
